sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, start_date DateTime, end_date DateTime, status String);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, toDateTime('2023-01-01 12:00:00'), toDateTime('2023-01-02 12:30:00'), 'active');
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (2, toDateTime('2023-01-03 15:00:00'), toDateTime('2023-01-03 15:00:01'), 'inactive');
SELECT id, age('minute', start_date, end_date) % 2 AS minute_diff_mod FROM test_dates WHERE age('minute', start_date, end_date) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, start_date, end_date, age('day', start_date, end_date) AS day_age FROM test_dates HAVING day_age > 0;
SELECT id, start_date, end_date, age('hour', start_date, end_date) AS hour_age, (age('hour', start_date, end_date) / 24) AS day_age FROM test_dates WHERE hour_age > 0;
SELECT id, dateDiff('second', start_date, end_date) % 100 AS second_mod FROM test_dates WHERE end_date > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY;
SELECT id, age('day', start_date, toDateTime('2024-01-01 00:00:00')) AS future_age FROM test_dates WHERE future_age IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, start_date, end_date, age('day', start_date, end_date) + 1 AS incremented_day_age FROM test_dates WHERE end_date < now();
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(age('minute', start_date, end_date) % 10) AS sum_mod FROM test_dates GROUP BY id HAVING count > 1;
